summary: Final regression after backend lifespan migration (asynccontextmanager replacing @app.on_event) and frontend refactor (index.tsx split into HistoryRow/PlayerModal/ConfirmDelete in /app/frontend/src/components and shared types/helpers in /app/frontend/src/lib/converter.ts; root TouchableWithoutFeedback replaced with Pressable). Backend: 10/10 pytest pass against the public EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. lifespan startup runs cleanly (supervisor log shows 'Application startup complete.' on every reload, no DeprecationWarning for on_event). Frontend (390x844 mobile viewport): app loads with brand 'AURAL / MP3' and headline 'AUDIO\nTO MP3.', empty-state renders when history is empty. Full convert flow with https://www.kozco.com/tech/piano2.wav -> player-modal opens automatically with title PIANO2, WWW.KOZCO.COM · 0:06 meta, transport (play-pause, seek-back, seek-forward) and SAVE TO FILES button all visible. After closing the player, history-item-0 is present and tapping it re-opens the player. Custom ConfirmDelete modal: tap delete-item-0 -> confirm-delete-modal renders; tap confirm-cancel -> modal closes and row remains; tap confirm-delete -> network log captured DELETE /api/conversions/{id} -> 200, row is removed from history and empty-state re-renders.

react_native_issues.issue: Library still emits 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' warning on web. Library-internal, not actionable in app code.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py lifespan handler uses _app param (unused) — fine; no warnings now. Cleanup vs iteration_2 confirmed: deprecated @app.on_event hooks removed.

index.tsx is now ~370 lines (was ~840) — within the 700-line guideline. HistoryRow/PlayerModal/ConfirmDelete are small focused components. Shared helpers (formatDuration/formatBytes/safeFilename/API/FALLBACK_ART/Conversion type) cleanly hoisted into src/lib/converter.ts.

ConfirmDelete uses an outer Pressable backdrop that calls onCancel — good UX. Inner card is also a Pressable to block bubble (no onPress) which works on react-native-web (verified: tapping card content does not dismiss).

PlayerModal imports useAudioPlayer from expo-audio (modern API) — OK. Player is constructed even when track is null (useAudioPlayer(null)); expo-audio handles null source gracefully — verified, no red screen.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on all requested flows (empty-state, convert, player-modal, history reopen, confirm-cancel keeps row, confirm-delete removes row + DELETE 200)

seed_data_creation: None persistent. Tests and FE flows create and tear down their own UUID conversions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactored layout: backend lifespan in server.py (no more @app.on_event). Frontend index.tsx delegates to src/components/{HistoryRow,PlayerModal,ConfirmDelete}.tsx and src/lib/converter.ts. All testIDs preserved (brand-label, app-title, empty-state, url-input, paste-button, convert-button, convert-dock, history-item-N, delete-item-N, player-modal, play-pause, seek-back, seek-forward, save-to-files, close-player, confirm-delete-modal, confirm-cancel, confirm-delete). Use https://www.kozco.com/tech/piano2.wav as the fast canonical sample (~149KB, ~6s mp3, ~6s end-to-end convert latency).
rca_of_issue: N/A — no defects found in this regression pass.
